Metadata.Title: CVE-2025-15281 affecting package glibc for versions less than 2.35-10
Metadata.Description: CVE-2025-15281 affecting package glibc for versions less than 2.35-10. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package glibc is earlier than 2.35-10, affected by CVE-2025-15281
